name: insurance claims managers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims managers processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient tracking causes delays in processing. We automate claim status tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of claim statuses leading to delays in processing.
